bills.title: AN ACT RELATING TO PUBLIC UTILITIES AND CARRIERS -- THERMAL ENERGY NETWORK AND JOBS ACT
bills.summary: Establishes the thermal energy network & jobs act, facilitating study of the technology to determine if goals can be met by implementing thermal energy networks in Rhode Island, and creates a task force of interested parties to be an advisory committee.

bills.title: AN ACT RELATING TO PUBLIC UTILITIES AND CARRIERS -- THERMAL ENERGY NETWORK AND JOBS ACT
bills.summary: Facilitates the study of thermal energy technology to determine if these goals can be met by the implementation of thermal energy networks in Rhode Island. --- *Note: The abstract as written contains an unresolved reference ("these goals") with no antecedent in the abstract itself. Per the rules, the smallest repair that preserves the original wording is to leave it intact, as introducing any specific goals would add meaning not present in the abstract.*
bills.officialAbstract: Facilitates the study of thermal energy technology to determine if these goals can be met by the implementation of thermal energy networks in Rhode Island.

bills.title: JOINT RESOLUTION CREATING A SPECIAL LEGISLATIVE COMMISSION TO STUDY SAFE STAFFING RATIOS IN HOSPITALS
bills.summary: Creates a 15-member joint commission to study and provide recommendations regarding safe staffing ratios in hospitals, which would report back to the General Assembly by September 1, 2027, and expire on January 30, 2028.
bills.officialAbstract: Creates a 15-member joint commission to study and provide recommendations regarding safe staffing ratios in hospitals, and who would report back to the General Assembly by September 1, 2027, and expire on January 30, 2028.

bills.title: AN ACT RELATING TO BUSINESSES AND PROFESSIONS -- REAL ESTATE BROKERS AND SALESPERSONS
bills.summary: Requires any person in the business of selling, assigning, or buying an equitable interest in real estate without taking legal title to such property to be licensed as a real estate broker or salesperson and to comply with the disclosure requirements.
bills.officialAbstract: Requires any person in the business of selling, assigning or buying an equitable interest in real estate without taking legal title to such property, to be licensed as a real estate broker or salesperson and to comply with the disclosure requirements.
